Let me note that possibility. So, if Apples are 3rd, then Oranges could be 4th and Mangoes 5th. That satisfies both clues 1 and 2. Now, we have positions 1 and 2 to fill, and the remaining fruits are Pears and Watermelons. But also, there's the clue that Pears > Watermelons. So Pears must be more expensive than Watermelons.
